title: Usage page not visible due to environment variable
symptom: The user cannot see the 'Settings → Usage' menu option in n8n. This issue does not show any error message but prevents access to enter an activation key.
applies_when: Environment variable N8N_HIDE_USAGE_PAGE is set to true
not_this_if: Environment variable N8N_HIDE_USAGE_PAGE is set to false
root_cause: The visibility of the 'Settings → Usage' page in n8n is controlled by the environment variable N8N_HIDE_USAGE_PAGE. If this variable is set to true, the usage page will be hidden, preventing access to certain features.
fix_steps: Locate the environment variable N8N_HIDE_USAGE_PAGE in your Docker configuration.
Change its value from true to false.
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Set the N8N_HIDE_USAGE_PAGE environment variable to false and restart n8n.
